must_detect.matched_text:
Data Processing Addendum Schedule (KSA PDPL) — Issuer Onboarding and Transfers for Al‑Darin Manufacturing JSC (Controller; CR: CR-ALD-0000) and Najm Al Noor Investor Services CJSC (Processor; CR: CR-NAN-FAKE1).
Purpose: processing of issuer onboarding records, insider lists, and investor registry to support listing and disclosure workflows with the national exchange and CMA filing portals; no marketing profiles are built as part of this service.
Lawful basis: performance of controller instructions and compliance with KSA capital markets and corporate recordkeeping obligations; consent is not relied upon for issuer registry processing, so withdrawal of consent does not affect these operations.
Data categories (labels only): InvestorID, Iqama/National ID token, Commercial Registration token, role email, and audit metadata; minimisation applies (fields collected strictly limited to required identifiers, with masking at rest).
Hosting and storage: primary systems are located in KSA; no routine cross‑border transfers are active for issuer registry or insider list data.
One‑time cross‑border export (completed): on 2026‑02‑20, a limited data extract (tokenised ID and role contact labels only) was transmitted to Al‑Darin Gulf Services SPC (fictional affiliate in Bahrain) under a SDAIA transfer permit REF SDAIA‑XFR‑XQ2190 and contractual safeguards; no further exports are scheduled.
Retention: issuer onboarding files retained 5 years from listing completion; insider list change logs retained 10 years; deletion and aggregation are scheduled per policy and subject to legal hold where applicable.
DSAR handling: requests are accepted via privacy@aldarin.example and fulfilled by the controller; current status shows no open DSARs, and test ticket DSAR‑TST‑000 (no real identifier) was closed within SLA.
Erasure: the processor deletes or anonymises records only upon written instruction from the controller; the last periodic deletion run completed on 2026‑04‑15 with verification logged (hashes stored, no raw IDs retained).
Consent withdrawal (marketing): not applicable to issuer registry; for newsletters managed by the controller’s IR team, unsubscribes are logged but no KSA‑directed campaigns are active at this time.
MNPI controls: this schedule does not disclose material non‑public information; examples herein are placeholders, do not identify live offerings, and contain no securities identifiers.
Security: National ID/Iqama and CR values are stored as salted hashes; access to raw input fields (where temporarily present) is restricted to a small operational role with MFA and daily access log review.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
